decisions.decision: categories field shape is string[] (array of trade-category strings), not a single string
decisions.rationale: D-01 multi-tag pattern from memory feedback_multi_tag_pill_pattern — categories can go many ways per supplier

decisions.decision: Add form requires >=1 category; Edit form allows empty array (legacy carve-out)
decisions.rationale: D-02 — new suppliers must self-classify, but legacy rows can be saved without forcing premature categorization during the manual-encoding pass

decisions.decision: Reuse .personnel-pill CSS class from components.css:1530-1648 for the new pill control
decisions.rationale: D-CONTEXT gotcha: existing pill style is visually generic — adding a parallel .category-pill class would have duplicated CSS for no benefit

decisions.decision: Categories column inserted at position 2 (between Supplier Name and Contact Person)
decisions.rationale: D-05 — places the most-likely-searched-by attribute next to the entity name; matches inline-edit row column order from Plan 02

decisions.decision: Em-dash with #94a3b8 muted color for empty/missing categories on display rows
decisions.rationale: D-06 — distinguishes empty rows visually so the manual encoding pass can find them via the 'Show uncategorized only' toggle
/suppliers/{supplierId} block at lines 354-362 has no field-level write restrictions; categories writes are automatically permitted under existing super_admin/procurement role gates

decisions.decision: MAX_CATEGORY_LENGTH=60 enforced via maxlength attribute AND JS check in commitNewCategoryPill
decisions.rationale: T-91.1-02 storage-bloat DoS mitigation — defense in depth, client-only since firestore.rules don't gate field length

decisions.decision: Every category string interpolated to DOM flows through escapeHTML()
decisions.rationale: T-91.1-01 XSS mitigation — categories are user-typed strings that get rendered to every viewer including admins/finance/viewers; single-quote becomes ' making onclick delimiter quoting safe without a second .replace() chain

next_action: Run python -m http.server 8000, navigate to #/procurement/suppliers, execute the 5 UAT items in remaining_tasks. If all pass, mark phase shipped and run /gsd-progress to pick next phase. If any fail, capture the failure in .planning/debug/ and route to /gsd-debug 91.1.
context_notes: Phase 91.1 was a 3-plan, fully-serialized execution (all plans touch app/views/procurement.js with a linear depends_on chain). All three plans landed in a single session with zero deviations, zero scope breaches, and clean syntax verification at each commit. The work introduces a multi-tag pill UI primitive that the codebase did not previously have at this generality — the 9 helper functions are reusable for any future tag-pill control. The phase deliberately stayed inside the Supplier Management surface; MRF/PR/PO linkage to supplier records is untouched (categories is a display-and-filter attribute, not a constraint). The four untracked files at session start belong to a parallel Phase 86.9 debug investigation and are NOT 91.1 carry-overs.
